earthquake_frequency.description: Mean frequency of large earthquakes capable of damaging important plant structures, used to compute λ_X = 0.2 for a 10-year period.

wind_frequency.description: Mean frequency of damaging high winds, used to compute λ_Y = 0.4 for a 10-year period.

time_period.description: The 10-year period over which the probability of the event is evaluated, used to scale the Poisson rates.
